name: Calculateur CAGR
description: Calculez le taux de croissance annuel composé d'un investissement.
seo_description: Calculez le taux de croissance annuel composé d'un investissement. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Outil gratuit avec formule et exemples.
example_label: Calculating CAGR for investment that grew from $50,to $89,over years.
result_context: The CAGR of {cagr}% represents the smoothed annual growth rate that would produit this result.
mistakes: Using arithmetic average instead of geometric (CAGR) for multi-year returns
Not accounting for cash flows during the investment period
Assuming CAGR reflects actuel year-by-year performance
